FIXTURE A - EXPERIENCED TECHNICAL PROFESSIONAL
Structure: multi-page technical CV with category-based skills, dates on separate lines, multiple employers, references, and education modules.
Invariant: employer/job-title relationship survives field-order differences.
Invariant: skill category headings are preserved as categories.

FIXTURE B - ENTRY LEVEL GRADUATE
Structure: education-heavy CV with projects, little experience, short skills list, and career objective.
Invariant: education modules do not merge into qualification names.
Invariant: projects remain projects rather than work history.

FIXTURE C - CORPORATE PROFESSIONAL
Structure: employer before job title, achievement bullets, date ranges, certifications, and business summary.
Invariant: date-only values never become job titles.
Invariant: achievement bullets stay attached to the correct role.

FIXTURE D - FRAGMENTED PLAIN TEXT
Structure: poor punctuation, wrapped sentences, missing full stops, and line-broken responsibilities.
Invariant: wrapped sentences reconstruct correctly.
Invariant: professional normalisation fixes punctuation without inventing metrics.

FIXTURE E - TWO COLUMN EXTRACTED ORDER
Structure: contact sidebar, skills sidebar, experience main column, and deliberately mixed raw extraction order.
Invariant: phone numbers never become languages.
Invariant: email addresses never become skills.

FIXTURE F - FRENCH CV
Structure: French headings, formation, experience professionnelle, competences, langues, and French date text.
Invariant: multilingual headings map to canonical sections without replacing the canonical CV model.

FIXTURE G - UNUSUAL HEADINGS
Structure: non-standard headings and meaningful unknown sections.
Invariant: unresolved content is preserved.
Invariant: unknown headings do not cause data loss.

FIXTURE H - DUPLICATE PAGE FURNITURE
Structure: repeated name, continued labels, page numbers, repeated footer, and repeated section titles.
Invariant: page numbers never become CV content.
Invariant: continuation labels never become CV content.

FIXTURE I - CONTACT CONTAMINATION
Structure: phone and email physically near language content in flattened extraction.
Invariant: phone numbers never become languages.
Invariant: email addresses never become skills.

FIXTURE J - SKILL HIERARCHY
Structure: category heading, tools, techniques, and fragmented competency sentences.
Invariant: skill category headings are preserved as categories.
Invariant: fragmented competency sentences are reconstructed before placement.

GLOBAL INVARIANTS
phone numbers never become languages
email addresses never become skills
date-only values never become job titles
page numbers never become CV content
continuation labels never become CV content
education modules do not merge into qualification names
skill category headings are preserved as categories
employer/job-title relationship survives field-order differences
wrapped sentences reconstruct correctly
unresolved content is preserved
meaningful content coverage is measured by reconciliation
no fixture-specific names are present in parser implementation
